calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Manfred Angstenberger and Shila Angstenberger, Appellants
Robert Wilson, Respondent

The cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Exhibit A (stapled packet of documents) is marked on behalf of Respondent Robert Wilson

Exhibit 1 (stapled packet with canceled checks on top)is marked on behalf of appellants Shila and Manfred Angstenberger.

The Court hears argument.

A copy of Appellants exhibit was made and the original exhibit was returned to Ms. Angstenberger. The Court retained Repondents exhibit. All exhibits may be returned upon the Court's ruling.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: A. James Robertson; Clekr: R. Goulding Not reported

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
